rationale: Library v1.1.0 adds 'Success Metrics' as required; the stale doc on disk is library_type_version 1.0.0. Contract A (the one this fixture pins): validator emits a non-fatal drift warning naming the missing section, but does NOT fail-build on pre-existing docs (read-only-OK semantics). The doc still validates (exit 0) but stderr surfaces a migration hint. This pins which of the two acceptable behaviors (warn vs. error) the family commits to.
